creator: andrew.hotlab@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Jesper Schmitz Mouridsen from comment #16)
Thank you. The test page works, but when I really share something using, for example, vdo.ninja or Nextcloud Talk, participants does not receive my video stream.

I ask if you can kindly suggest me how to better debug the issue, since I know almost nothing about WebRTC, thanks! :)
